jobDescription: ABOUT US RAISINWe are a dynamic, successful, and quickly growing Fin Tech company based in Berlin, that aims to making savings and investments digitally accessible to improve customer benefit. Our goal is to provide customers all over Europe with simple, secure, and profitable savings and investment products. We have received more than €170 million in funding from well-known investors including Thrive Capital, Ribbit Capital, Index Ventures, Yuri Milner, Tom Stafford and Pay Pal. We are available in English across Europe and operate country-dedicated platforms in Germany, France, Spain, Austria, UK, and the Netherlands. Raisin is one of the leading Fin Tech companies in Europe and has featured in The Fin Tech50 in 2016, 2017, and 2018. Raisin already has more than 165,000 satisfied customers and exceeding €11 billion in assets invested via the Raisin platforms. OUR BENEFITSBe part of a diverse team of more than 34 different nationalities, who strongly believes in agile cross-functional methods, collaboration and appreciation in our daily work. We are professional and work hard to always be the best in our field. You find us in our open office in beautiful Prenzlauer Berg well connected to public transport and surrounded by a great variety of restaurants and supermarkets. Relocation and visa support as well as a relocation reimbursement Personal training budget of 1,500 € and four full training days Free choice of hardware Beginner German classes directly at the office and financial support for acquiring a language certificate Hungry all the time? Breakfast, snacks, daily fresh fruit as well as drinks are provided Stay up to date at regular townhall sessions with our founders and feel free to ask any kinds of questions Flexible working hours, home office and 28 vacation days Enjoy more than 50+ different sports with Urban Sports Club: We subsidize your membership with more than 20 € per month We offer you a company pension scheme ( Betriebliche Altersvorsorge), which we support with 20 % Enjoy yearly company retreats to exciting European cities and other team events, such as Lunch Lottery, Tech Lunch, Xletix and Raisin Ladies Events YOUR RESPONSIBILITIESFor further development and expansion of our successful business, Raisin is looking for highly motivated, smart and driven engineering leads to complement our team in Berlin. As a Java developer here, you will be working on our online banking system together with an international team of top developers. Lead a team of backend software engineers Strong hands-on contribution in a cross-functional team Lead, plan and execute technical projects in an agile environment Providing core services and high quality solutions for a large scale online platform Contribute to an efficient development environment and optimal workflows for the whole engineering organization Set standards, document guidelines and share best practices to ensure continuous learning and knowledge transfer YOUR PROFILEUniversity degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems or related fields or equivalent practical experience You bring at least 3 years of leadership experience You know how to manage software projects to a successful delivery in collaborative way Entrepreneurial mind-set and the ability to guide teams towards a common goal in a fast-paced international environment At least 5 years of strong hands-on experience as Java software developer Advanced knowledge of software development lifecycle in a Java based landscape You are comfortable with very open code and architecture discussions You are an open-minded and creative team player Writing clean, maintainable and well documented code comes naturally - we strongly believe in Uncle Bob Fluency in English, German language skills are a plus though not mandatory
